summary: Phase 3.7d Testing Complete - Teacher Assignment UI, Individual Pricing Disclaimers, WhatsApp Update. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/teacher/list correctly returns teacher list with id, full_name, email, active fields
POST/DELETE /api/teacher/assignments correctly requires staff/admin role (403 for teacher/applicant)
GET /api/teacher/my-students correctly consent-gated - only shows students with active teacher_data_access consent
TeacherAssignmentPanel in ApplicantDetailPage shows privacy notice about consent-gated data access
AGB §5 Zahlungsbedingungen explicitly states individual pricing: 'Die konkreten Kosten und Gebühren hängen vom jeweiligen Einzelfall ab'
FAQ section includes new pricing question: 'Was kosten die Kurse?' with individual pricing answer
Contact page WhatsApp links correctly point to wa.me/4915208496876
Cost simulator returns individual pricing disclaimers (MOCKED - COST_SIMULATOR_ENABLED=false)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7d complete. Teacher Assignment Panel visible in /staff/applications/:id. GET /api/teacher/list returns teachers. Consent page at /portal/consents with teacher_data_access consent. WhatsApp: wa.me/4915208496876. AGB §5 has individual pricing disclaimer. FAQ has pricing question. Cost simulator is MOCKED internally.
passed_checks: Backend: GET /api/teacher/list - staff can list teachers with id, full_name, email
Backend: GET /api/teacher/list - teacher can also list teachers
Backend: GET /api/teacher/assignments - staff can list all assignments
Backend: GET /api/teacher/assignments - teacher can list own assignments
Backend: GET /api/consents/types - includes teacher_data_access with scope/excludes
Backend: POST /api/consents/grant - applicant can grant consent
Backend: GET /api/consents/my - applicant can view own consents
Backend: POST /api/consents/revoke - applicant can revoke consent
Backend: GET /api/internal/cost-simulator/config - staff can access, returns individual pricing disclaimer
Frontend: FAQ section has 'Was kosten die Kurse?' pricing question
Frontend: Contact page WhatsApp links point to wa.me/4915208496876 (2 links found)
Frontend: AGB page §5 Zahlungsbedingungen has individual pricing disclaimer ('Einzelfall')
Frontend: Staff can navigate to applicant detail page
Frontend: TeacherAssignmentPanel visible in applicant detail with privacy notice
Frontend: Onboarding tour modal appears for applicants
Frontend: Consent page at /portal/consents loads correctly
Frontend: Consent page shows teacher_data_access consent card with scope/excludes

mocked_apis.cost_simulator: MOCKED internally (COST_SIMULATOR_ENABLED=false) - returns individual pricing message
